metadata.description: z0rd0n88's Claude Code mods — one plugin, one namespace.

plugins.name: ClaudesMods
plugins.description: z0rd0n88's Claude Code mods, unified into a single plugin: idea review/critique, multi-agent build & review loops, spec authoring, session orchestration, and productivity utilities.

plugins.name: claude-md-trim
plugins.description: Trim always-loaded agent context files (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md) to invariants + pointers — relocate detail to linked docs, verify against ground truth, one PR per repo, multi-repo capable.
